intro: Klaxons scream across the plant floor. The core is going critical, and three coolant units flash wildly different readings. There is only time to shut ONE down.
title: Reactor Meltdown
description: The reactor is moments from blowing. Three coolant units are spiking - the shutdown order has to go to the one running HOTTEST. Read the gauges and call it: get it right and the stored charge crystallises into a Capacitor relic, get it wrong and the partial blowout will scorch your whole team.
query: Which unit do you shut down?

1.label: Shut down Unit 1
1.selected: You slam the cutoff on Unit 1...

2.label: Shut down Unit 2
2.selected: You slam the cutoff on Unit 2...

3.label: Shut down Unit 3
3.selected: You slam the cutoff on Unit 3...

stabilized: The right unit! The core sighs back to safe levels, and the bled-off charge hardens into a Capacitor.
blowout: Wrong unit - the core lurches and a wave of heat washes over your team before the failsafes catch it. You grab what loose charge you can on the way out.
